calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners David R. Ongaro, Ongaro Pcs Petition To Confirm Nonbinding Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-23-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS DAVID R. ONGARO AND ONGARO PC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM NONBINDING ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD

Appearances: David R. Ongaro of Ongaro PC (415.433.3900) for petitioners and moving parties; Mariya Rychkova (209.981.5691) respondent and opposing party appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

The court indicates its tentative ruling is to deny petitioners' motion. Parties present arguments. At the conclusion of arguments, the court rules as follows: petitioners' motion is denied. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
